caption: A man with a dark complexion and facial hair is recording a podcast in a studio. He wears a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK ITT" visible on the front, a black baseball cap with a logo, over-ear headphones, and a gold necklace with a pendant. He sits behind a professional microphone on a stand. The background features a white wall with repeated "HUSTLE" text and star graphics, and a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen overlays include a logo on the left that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a red and white logo on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Across the frames, the man is speaking, shifting his facial expressions and gesturing with his hands. In the beginning, he gestures with his right hand, and later, his right hand moves toward his chest while he continues to talk.
